overall.description: First-person exploration of a circular medieval wizarding dormitory with rich wooden beams, red tapestries, and four-poster beds. The player character walks through the warm candlelit room before looking up at an ornate stained glass ceiling window, revealing the detailed Gothic architecture of the tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular medieval dormitory with four-poster beds

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the dormitory, observing the wooden furniture and tapestries

entered.detail: tall dark wood wardrobe with brass handles
thick wooden structural beam supporting the ceiling
canopy bed with dark wood frame and draped curtains
upholstered reading chair with high back
wall hanging depicting trees on red background covering curved wall
small upholstered footrest in front of armchair

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a warm, candlelit circular room with rich wooden architecture. A large wardrobe stands to the left while a four-poster bed occupies the center area, surrounded by leather seating and ornate red tapestries covering the curved walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: central dormitory area with study nook

events.description: camera begins tilting upward from floor level toward the ceiling

agents.ego_description: approaching the center of the room where an owl is perched, then beginning to look upward

notable_agents.action: white owl perched on a wooden stand, turning its head to observe surroundings

entered.detail: large antique trunk with leather straps and metal corners
pile of books stacked on a small wooden table
triangular pennant flags hanging from ceiling beams
lit lantern suspended from wooden ceiling beam

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the room's center, revealing an owl perched on a stand near a wooden chest. As the camera continues forward, it begins tilting upward, shifting focus from the floor furnishings to the ceiling architecture above.

scene_state.functional_zone: tower ceiling with stained glass window

events.description: view transitions from ground floor to ceiling focus revealing the rose window

agents.ego_description: looking up at the ornate stained glass window in the tower ceiling

entered.detail: large circular stained glass window with intricate geometric patterns and warm colors
exposed wooden ceiling beams forming triangular structural trusses

segments.scene_description: The camera focuses entirely on the ceiling, showcasing a magnificent circular stained glass rose window set within wooden truss beams. The warm light filters through the colored glass, illuminating the Gothic architecture of the circular tower room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a warm, candlelit dormitory that transitions from a detailed exploration of the room's furnishings to a sweeping view of its Gothic ceiling. It begins by gliding past a large wardrobe and a four-poster bed, moving through a circular space adorned with leather seating and ornate red tapestries. As the camera approaches the center of the room, it passes an owl perched near a wooden chest before beginning a gradual tilt upward. The focus then shifts from the floor to the overhead architecture, expanding to reveal a magnificent circular stained glass rose window. Finally, the view settles on the intricate wooden truss beams as warm light filters through the colored glass, illuminating the height of the tower.
